quiz.question: Now it’s time to quiz you on what you just learned! How many frames is this animation? Hint: You can check using the onion tool.
What is the onion tool used for?
options: It allows you to see other frames transparently
It permanently makes your frames transparent

quiz.question: What happens when you increase the frames per second? (Increasing FPS means playing more frames within each second)
For a short bouncing-ball animation, roughly how many frames do you need at minimum to see clear motion?
